name: 旧日回响Echoes of the Past
author: Wingidon(Toast)

firstNightReminder: Wake the Diplomat and tell them the shortest distance from an Outsider to a Minion, or shake your head "no" if no Outsiders are in-play. Then, put the Diplomat to sleep.
name: 外交官
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知在场的外来者与爪牙之间最近的距离，或者你会得知没有外来者在场。[+0-1外来者](邻座玩家距离为1)
flavor: This can undoubtedly be settled without violence.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Historian & show them 3 characters in any order. Exactly 1 is in-play, the other 2 are out-of-play. Then, put the Historian to sleep.
name: 历史学家
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知三个角色，其中有且只有一个角色在场。
flavor: Some say that history is unimportant in this scenario. I beg to differ; knowing the town's history helps narrow down what we're dealing with.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Squire & show them an in-play character token. Give them a finger signal for how many steps away from the nearest Minion it is. Then, put the Squire to sleep.
name: 侍从
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一名在场角色以及他到离他最近的爪牙的距离。(邻座玩家距离为1)
flavor: Halt! For what purpose do you come here?

firstNightReminder: Wake the Advocate. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the "Chosen" reminder token. Then, put the Advocate to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Advocate. If a player has the "Executed Today" reminder token on them, point at a player of the same alignment as them. Then, the Advocate will choose a player. Mark that player with the "Chosen" reminder token. Then, put the Advocate to sleep.
name: 代言人
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名存活玩家：如果他明天白天被处决，你会在当晚得知一名与他阵营相同的玩家。
flavor: To play Devil's Advocate here though...

otherNightReminder: The Guardsman uses their ability.
name: 卫兵
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择两名玩家和一个非恶魔角色类型：你会得知他们之间顺时针方向上有多少个该角色类型的玩家。如果他们之间顺时针方向上都是相同角色类型玩家，你得知的信息会+1或-1。
attribution: Backup on Discord helped me with the wording on this one.
flavor: You're not the Apothecary. Try again.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Overseer. They make a choice. Nod your head "yes" or shake your head "no" depending on the info they receive. Then, put the Overseer to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Overseer. They make a choice. Nod your head "yes" or shake your head "no" depending on the info they receive. Then, put the Overseer to sleep.
name: 监视者
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一个除你以外的善良角色：如果这个角色在场，你会得知与他邻近的玩家中是否有邪恶玩家。如果这个角色不在场，你得知的信息由说书人决定。
flavor: Hmm, the Crossbowman is acting quite strangely tonight...

otherNightReminder: Wake the Scholar & show them a character token. They will choose a player (or shake their head "no" to signal that they think no-one is). Point at a player corresponding to their info. Then, put the Scholar to sleep.
name: 学者
ability: 每个夜晚*，你会得知一个角色并猜测谁是这个角色(或者这个角色不在场)：如果猜测正确，你会得知一名邪恶玩家，但如果猜测错误，你得知的信息由说书人决定。
flavor: The society that separates its scholars from its warriors will have its thinking done by cowards and its fighting done by fools.

otherNightReminder: Wake the Blacksmith & use their ability. I'm not writing a reminder for this.
name: 铁匠
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名与之前不同的死亡玩家：你获得他的能力直到下个黄昏，如果他是邪恶的，你中毒直到你选择了善良玩家。
attribution: Backup on Discord helped me with balance on this one.
flavor: I made this for the Ranger, but they died... Perhaps I ought to give it a try myself.

otherNightReminder: Remove the Pathfinder's POISONED reminder token. Wake the Pathfinder. They will choose 2 players: Mark both with the Pathfinder's SAFE reminder token. Then, put the Pathfinder to sleep. If either of the Pathfinder's choices were evil, mark the Pathfinder with their POISONED reminder token.
name: 开拓者
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择除你以外的两名玩家：他们当晚不会死亡。如果你选中了邪恶玩家，你中毒直到下个黄昏。
flavor: Follow the path until you're here, then take a left and pass through the treeline. Just watch out for traps, the town Trapper is quite careless.

otherNightReminder: Wake the Ranger. They will choose a player. Then, put the Ranger to sleep.
name: 游侠
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：当晚如果他将要死亡，他不会死亡，且在此之后你要额外选择一名玩家：如果你选中了爪牙，你和他一起死亡。
flavor: You're safe with me, my friend. If anyone so much as lays a finger on you, they will face my wrath.

otherNightReminder: If the Crossbowman shot a Minion today, that Minion dies. Mark the Minion with the Crossbowman's DEAD reminder token.
name: 弩箭手
ability: 每局游戏限两次，在白天时，你可以公开选择一名玩家和一个爪牙角色：如果你选择的玩家是你选择的爪牙角色，他会在当晚死亡。
flavor: Perish!

firstNightReminder: If the Student isn't marked with the NO ABILITY reminder token, wake the Student. They might choose a character. Nod your head "Yes" if they're in-play. Otherwise, shake your head "No". Then, if the Student used their ability, mark the Student with their NO ABILITY reminder token. Then, put the Student to sleep.
otherNightReminder: If the Student isn't marked with the NO ABILITY reminder token, wake the Student. They might choose a character. Nod your head "Yes" if they're in-play. Otherwise, shake your head "No". Then, if the Student used their ability, mark the Student with their NO ABILITY reminder token. Then, put the Student to sleep.
name: 学生
ability: 每局游戏限两次，在夜晚时，你可以选择一个角色：你会得知这个角色是否在场。
flavor: We don't have a Squire in this town!

otherNightReminder: If the Beekeeper died tonight, wake them & tell them an in-play evil character. Then, put the Beekeeper to sleep & mark the player with that character with the Beekeeper's DRUNK(4) reminder token: They are drunk. If an evil player is already drunk, swap their token for the next, unless there isn't another reminder - at this point, they sober up.
name: 养蜂人
ability: 如果你在夜晚死亡，你会得知一个在场的邪恶角色：他醉酒两天两夜。
flavor: Attack the queen bee and be stung by her workers.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Apothecary. They will choose a player. Nod your head "Yes" or shake your head "No" depending on their result. Then, put the Apothecary to sleep.
otherNightReminder: If the Apothecary or their lifelink is dead, kill the other. Otherwise, wake the Apothecary. They will choose a player. Nod your head "Yes" or shake your head "No" depending on their result. Then, put the Apothecary to sleep.
name: 药剂师
ability: 你的生死与你的病人(一名善良玩家)紧密相连，但你不知道他是谁。如果你们中其中一人死亡，另一名玩家也会死亡。每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：你会得知他是否是你的病人。
flavor: Here, try this. It'll ease your pain.

otherNightReminder: If the Messenger is dead, wake the Demon. If this is the first night that the Messenger has been dead, show the Demon the "THIS CHARACTER SELECTED YOU" card & the Messenger's character token. Then, show the Demon the Grimoire.
name: 邮差
ability: 如果你死亡，恶魔会得知这一消息。从现在起，恶魔每晚可以查看魔典。
flavor: M'lord, I was told to give you this.

otherNightReminder: If less than 5 players live, wake the Pariah. Show them the "YOU ARE" card and the Pariah character token. They now know that they are the Pariah. Then, put the Pariah to sleep.
name: 弃子
ability: 你以为你是一个镇民角色，但其实你不是。你可能会被当作是任何阵营、任何角色。如果小于等于5名玩家存活，你会得知你是弃子。
flavor: I'm not from around here. Can you tell?

firstNightReminder: Mark 2 players with the Trapper's TRAPPED reminder.
otherNightReminder: If nobody died tonight, mark the TRAPPED players with the Trapper's DEAD reminder token: They die. Wake the Trapper and notify them of who their traps killed. Put the Trapper to sleep & mark 2 new players with their TRAPPED reminder token.
name: 陷阱师
ability: 始终会有两名存活玩家受困。每个夜晚*，如果没有玩家死亡，你会得知哪两名玩家受困：他们死亡。
attribution: Thanks to SuperGD for help with balancing this (if I remember correctly).
flavor: Walking into a bear trap, huh, Pathfinder? How careless.

firstNightReminder: Wake the Eavesdropper and notify them what their phrase is. Then, put the Eavesdropper to sleep.
otherNightReminder: If a player has the Eavesdropper's SAID PHRASE reminder token on them, they die. Mark them with the Eavesdropper's DEAD reminder token. Then, wake the Eavesdropper & point at the player they killed. Put the Eavesdropper to sleep.
name: 窃听者
ability: 在你的首个夜晚，你会得知一段秘密短语。每局游戏至多两次，在白天时，说出这个短语的善良玩家会在当晚死亡，且你会得知他是谁。
flavor: Very interesting...

firstNightReminder: Wake the Forger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Forger's MISREGISTER reminder token. Then, put the Forger to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Forger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Forger's MISREGISTER reminder token. Then, put the Forger to sleep.
name: 伪造者
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名与上个夜晚不同的玩家：他可能会被当作与他阵营对立的阵营和角色，直到下个黄昏。
flavor: Mr. Proctor was very clearly a mere Student.

otherNightReminder: Wake the Priest. They will choose a player. If they chose an Outsider, mark that Outsider with the Priest's DEAD reminder token: They die. Then, put the Priest to sleep.
name: 神父
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：如果他是一名外来者,他死亡。[+1外来者]
flavor: Be cleansed of all your curses!

firstNightReminder: Wake the Saboteur. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Saboteur's MAD reminder. Then, put the Saboteur to sleep. Wake the Saboteur's target & notify them that they have been selected, and point to the two characters that the Saboteur selected on their character sheet. Then, put that player to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Saboteur. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Saboteur's MAD reminder. Then, put the Saboteur to sleep. Wake the Saboteur's target & notify them that they have been selected, and point to the two characters that the Saboteur selected on their character sheet. Then, put that player to sleep.
name: 破坏者
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家和两个角色：如果他明天白天'疯狂'证明你选择的两个角色或破坏者在场，他可能会被处决。
flavor: Knock out the base, and everything comes crumbling down.

otherNightReminder: Wake the Myling. They will choose a player. That player dies - mark them with the Myling's DEAD reminder token. If they have nominated evil this game, notify the Myling: They will nod their head "yes" or shake their head "no" for whether or not other evil nominators die. Then, put the Myling to sleep.
name: 鬼婴
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。每局游戏限一次，如果他提名过邪恶玩家：你可以选择杀死除他以外的提名过邪恶玩家的玩家。
flavor: *ghost noises*

otherNightReminder: Wake the Poltergeist. They will choose a player - mark that player with the Poltergeist's DEAD reminder token: They die. If they were poisoned, mark another poisoned player with the Poltergeist's DEAD reminder token: They die. If the Poltergeist kills an Outsider, nod your head "yes" at them. Then, put the Poltergeist to sleep.
name: 喧闹鬼
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。如果你杀死了一名中毒的玩家，会有额外一名玩家死亡。如果你杀死了一名外来者，与他邻近的一名镇民玩家中毒且你会得知他是谁。[+1外来者]
attribution: Backup on Discord helped me with the wording on this one.
flavor: *more ghost noises*

firstNightReminder: Wake the Wraith. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Wraith's POISONED reminder token. Put the Wraith to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Wraith. They will choose a player. That player dies - mark them with the Wraith's DEAD reminder token. Then, put the Wraith to sleep. If nobody has died tonight, even after that, wake the Wraith again & show them the "This Character Chose You" card followed by their own token, then prompt them with the "Make a Choice" card. They choose a player to poison. The previously poisoned player dies: Mark them with the Wraith's DEAD reminder token. Then, put the Wraith to sleep.
name: 亡魂
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。每个夜晚，如果没有玩家将要死亡，你要选择一名玩家：他中毒且上一个中毒的玩家死亡。
attribution: Backup on Discord helped me with the wording on this one.
flavor: *even more ghost noises*

otherNightReminder: The Yokai uses their ability.
name: 妖怪
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家：他死亡。每局游戏限一次，在夜晚时*，如果大于等于5名玩家存活，你可以修改你要选择的玩家的数量(1、2、3)：被你选择的玩家死亡。
flavor: *you know the drill by now*

firstNightReminder: Wake the Accomplice. They will choose a player - mark that player with the Accomplice's CHOSEN reminder. If/when they wake tonight, after you put them to sleep, use their ability yourself and tell the Accomplice the results or targets if applicable.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Accomplice. They will choose a player - mark that player with the Accomplice's CHOSEN reminder. If/when they wake tonight, after you put them to sleep, use their ability yourself and tell the Accomplice the results or targets if applicable.
name: 同谋
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名非旅行者玩家：说书人可能会在当晚再次使用他的能力且你会得知说书人选择的目标以及结果。

name: 交际花
ability: 每个白天，你可以公开选择一名玩家：如果他不是恶魔，他在当晚不会被唤醒。

firstNightReminder: Wake the Costermonger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Costermonger's SAFE reminder. Then, put the Costermonger to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Wake the Costermonger. They will choose a player. Mark that player with the Costermonger's SAFE reminder. Then, put the Costermonger to sleep.
name: 街头小贩
ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：他当晚只会因自身能力中毒、醉酒、疯狂或获得错误信息。

firstNightReminder: Wake the Musician. They will choose 2 players. If the 1st will wake before the 2nd due to their own abilities, nod at the Musician & show them a finger signal for how many are good. If the Musician is evil, mark them both with the Musician's POISONED reminder. Then, put the Musician to sleep.
otherNightReminder: Remove any active Musician POISONED reminders. Wake the Musician. They will choose 2 players. If the 1st will wake before the 2nd due to their own abilities, nod at the Musician & show them a finger signal for how many are good. If the Musician is evil, mark them both with the Musician's POISONED reminder. Then, put the Musician to sleep.
name: 音乐家
ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名玩家和一个角色：如果他的角色类型与你选择的角色对应的角色类型相同：他变成你选择的角色。如果你选择了一名邪恶玩家：他会得知你选择的角色。
